product.description: Anchor is the No.1 Dairy Brand in New Zealand, well trusted by Chefs all around the world. Anchor Brand originates  from New Zealand, a source of pure goodness. Our products are made with the goodness of dairy, whether it’s milk, yoghurt or cheese. Nature’s way of helping you start strong and go strong daily. We believe that goodness feeds greatness.

metaData.Ingredients: Pasteurised Cream (from Cow's Milk), Water, Salt
metaData.Key Information: The Anchor™?  Salted Butter offers the pure, delectable taste of cream with a touch of salt, made the traditional way using purely natural ingredients, using the freshest milk from pasture-fed cows, the rich, smooth taste of this butter makes every meal irresistible and naturally delicious. Free from additives, preservatives and coloring, it is wonderfully versatile - great for baking, cooking or as a spread on its own.

product.description: Spread LURPAK® Spreadable Salted Butter onto a fresh slice of bread or toast in the morning, or take your regular sandwich to a whole new level with a real buttery taste.

metaData.Ingredients: Butter (64%), Rapeseed Oil, Water, Lactic Culture, Salt, Contains Milk
metaData.Key Information:
• Pure Lurpak butter blended with a dash of highly refined rapeseed oil to make it soft and easily spreadable straight from the fridge
• It uses all-natural ingredients, 100% fresh milk and lactic acid culture that gives its fresh, pure, acidulous and unique butter taste
• Free from colourings, additives, preservatives and palm oil
• Suitable for vegetarians or those opting for a vegetarian diet
